<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace DI\Definition\Exception; use DI\Definition\Definition; use Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface; /** * Invalid DI definitions. * * @author Matthieu Napoli <matthieu@mnapoli.fr> */ class InvalidDefinition extends \Exception implements ContainerExceptionInterface { public static function create(Definition $definition, string $message, ?\Exception $previous = null) : self { return new self(sprintf( '%s' . \PHP_EOL . 'Full definition:' . \PHP_EOL . '%s', $message, (string) $definition ), 0, $previous); } }
